---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested feature in one sentence.

## Problem

What pain point does this solve?

## Proposed outcome

What should success look like?

## Alternatives considered

List alternatives and why they are less preferred.

## Notes

Link related entries in `docs/maintainers/ROADMAP.md`, `docs/maintainers/TASKS.md`, or `/DECISIONS.md` if relevant.
